title: Mexican Black Beans Recipe
description: These Mexican Black Beans are my go-to side dish for Taco Tuesday or when I make enchiladas. They are SO good and SO easy to make!

ingredients.name: (16 oz) can black beans, do not drain

steps: In a small sauce pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onions and garlic and cook for 3-4 minutes, just until the onions begin to soften.
Add the undrained black beans, cilantro, cumin, and salt. Stir well and reduce heat to medium low. Allow to cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Taste and adjust seasonings to your liking.
Serve sprinkled with more chopped cilantro and cotija cheese if desired. Enjoy!
